base_size.note: Varies by effect type - particles are 2-4px, speech bubble is 12x10px

shared_attributes.layer: foreground (on top of all other elements)

context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet game where player cares for Echo the cockatiel
context.role: Discomfort indicator that appears around Echo when cage is dirty (3+ poop present)
context.screen_position: Spawns around Echo at x=55-73px, y=50-70px (random positions in area around Echo)
context.usage_scenario: 3-5 dust particles continuously spawn and drift around Echo while in dirty state. Each particle drifts slowly in random direction, fading out after 1-2 seconds. Indicates unclean environment.

animation.description: Frame 1: Pixel appears. Frames 2-5: Drifts in random direction (up/down/left/right) 1-2px per frame. Frame 6: Fades to 0%. Total movement: 4-8px in random direction. Duration: 2 seconds.

visual_specification.details: Single 1x1px in #C2C3C7. Spawns at random position around Echo (within 10px radius). Drifts slowly in random direction. 3-5 dust particles active simultaneously during dirty state. New particle spawns every 0.5 seconds to maintain count.

relationships.shared_with: Same gray color (#C2C3C7) as cage bars
relationships.differences_from: Unlike other particles: smallest (1x1px), random drift direction, continuous spawn during state, gray color, slowest movement.
